items.title: [负面] 这里有经典米池（每30抽一次小保底，90抽大保底），角色，专武完全体解锁一共需要16个。这里还有逆天...
items.summary: 这里有经典米池（每30抽一次小保底，90抽大保底），角色，专武完全体解锁一共需要16个。这里还有逆天策划，强力角色上线表现过于良好直接削弱。以上部分小缺点受得了就等你来挑战。

items.title: [正面] The Game History, the gamplay is Incredible, but G...
items.summary: The Game History, the gamplay is Incredible, but GAD DAMN... I loosed 3 times my Wishes on a Character... Because there isn't any 50% Pity system Sadly... I guess I m gonna try again :/

items.title: [正面] The translation is absolutely terrible and the gam...
items.summary: The translation is absolutely terrible and the game feels like a mobile port, with the ui feeling very unresponsive compared to games that are made for the pc. Even so, the core gameplay is really fun and as far as gacha go, it's extremely generous.

items.title: [正面] I was expecting dread being heavily lovecraftian, ...
items.summary:
I was expecting dread being heavily lovecraftian, but instead this game is incredibly gloomy more like a Poe story (you start the game by carving your gravestone for crying out loud). 
While I don't have the depression necesarry to fully enjoy this story (quite the opposite in fact, as I know the true of the universe is that it is eternal, rather than an end) I still found the story interesting past the tutorial.

items.title: [正面] Game recently updated and gotten another lease on ...
items.summary:
Game recently updated and gotten another lease on its lifespan.

Gacha aspects are pretty F2P friendly, and the game itself is pretty fun with its similarity to Slay the Spire.
Story is pretty good, but it suffers from a chatGPT translation. However, it's understandable at least.
